description_long: This sculpture depicts three nude female figures standing closely together in a circular embrace, their arms intertwined around each other's shoulders and backs. The figures are rendered in a classical style, with detailed hair, soft facial features, and naturalistic body proportions. The central figure stands with her back to the viewer, while the two flanking figures face slightly inward, creating a sense of unity and intimacy. The group stands on an oval base, and one figure rests her hand on a small cylindrical pedestal. The material appears to be a smooth, white stone or marble, giving the sculpture a refined and elegant appearance. The overall composition suggests themes of harmony, beauty, and companionship.
description: A classical white sculpture of three nude women embracing in a circle, standing on an oval base with detailed features and a smooth finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the back and profile of two figures, with their arms wrapped around each other and the third figure partially visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backs of all three figures, their intertwined arms, and the oval base supporting them.
description_view_2: Side view from the opposite direction, focusing on the profile and back of the central and rightmost figures, with the cylindrical pedestal visible.
description_view_3: Frontal view displaying the faces and torsos of all three women as they embrace, with the oval base and pedestal clearly seen.
attribute_subject_matter: three nude female figures in a classical embrace
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
